packs.name: arklint/fastapi
packs.description: FastAPI best practices - routers, dependencies, schemas, no direct DB in routes

packs.name: arklint/django
packs.description: Django conventions - views, models, serializers, no raw SQL in views

packs.name: arklint/nextjs
packs.description: Next.js App Router conventions - server/client components, data fetching patterns

packs.name: arklint/express
packs.description: Express.js patterns - middleware, routes, controllers separation

packs.name: arklint/clean-arch
packs.description: Generic clean architecture - entities, use cases, interfaces, infrastructure layers
